name: Clinikally The Ultimate NIA (10% Niacinamide) Serum
description: A niacinamide-based serum for oily, acne-prone, and sensitive skin.
claims: May help reduce blemishes
May improve uneven skin tone
May support oil control
May support skin barrier function
risk_factors: May cause irritation in sensitive skin
Patch test recommended

name: Clinikally HydraSoft Gentle Skin Cleanser
description: A gentle, non-drying lotion cleanser for removing impurities without disrupting the skin's moisture barrier.
claims: May help cleanse without drying
May support skin barrier moisture
May temporarily soothe minor irritation
risk_factors: Avoid direct contact with eyes

name: Clinikally SunProtect Sunscreen SPF 50/PA+++
description: A broad-spectrum non-comedogenic sunscreen providing complete defense against UVA/UVB rays, Infrared Radiation, and Blue Light.
claims: Provides broad-spectrum UV protection
May assist in preventing sun-induced aging changes
Formulated to reduce risk of clogging pores
risk_factors: Contains Benzophenone-3
Requires regular reapplication every 2 hours under physical outdoor stress

name: Clinikally Hair ReGrow Serum
description: A topical hair formulation targeting hair thinning and structural follicle management.
claims: May support hair retention
May assist in managing daily hair fall
May support follicle conditioning
risk_factors: May cause localized scalp itching or redness in rare instances
contraindications: Not recommended during pregnancy or nursing without explicit medical clearance

name: UVSkrin SS Silicone Sunscreen Gel SPF 50+
description: A silicone-based sunscreen gel designed for a matte finish and UV protection.
claims: Provides UVA and UVB defense
Offers a matte, non-greasy surface layer
risk_factors: May cause mild congestion or breakouts in profiles sensitive to heavy silicones

name: DERMATICA RAY: Protect Barelyon Fluid Sunscreen SPF 50
description: A fluid sunscreen formulated to protect against UVA, UVB, and environmental radiation stressors.
claims: Provides broad-spectrum UV protection
Lightweight fluid texture suitable as a smooth base
risk_factors: May cause mild skin dryness or tightening over extended wear

name: Puerile Foaming Cleanser
description: A mild, sulfate-free daily face wash designed to clear surface impurities.
claims: Gently cleanses surface dirt and excess oils
Helps preserve baseline epidermal hydration
risk_factors: Discontinue if baseline hypersensitivity or stinging arises

name: Cestia Gentle Skin Cleanser
description: A soap-free, fatty-alcohol based cleanser formulated for highly reactive or dry skin profiles.
claims: Cleanses without soap-induced irritation
Assists in maintaining essential skin lipid levels
risk_factors: Contains parabens which may cause contact reactions in individuals sensitized to preservatives

name: Cetaphil Gentle Skin Cleanser (Dry to Normal, Sensitive Skin)
description: A soap-free, non-irritating daily formula designed to cleanse while keeping skin hydrated.
claims: Cleanses while preserving natural skin hydration limits
Helps manage visible signs of skin sensitivity like dryness or roughness
risk_factors: Requires appropriate rinsing or clean wiping to prevent residue buildup

name: Aczit 12% Niacinamide Face Serum
description: A concentrated niacinamide serum optimized for managing excess sebum production and surface marks.
claims: May support blemish management
Assists in controlling surface sebum shine
Helps visually brighten minor skin discoloration
risk_factors: High level of active ingredients; initial patch test is recommended before applying over full face

name: The CuraTeam Go-Clear Anti Acne Serum
description: A chemically exfoliating nighttime facial serum containing Salicylic Acid and Azelaic Acid.
claims: Assists in exfoliating dead skin cells
Helps clear and unclog pores
May support managing breakout-prone skin surfaces
risk_factors: May cause transient stinging, redness, or localized skin peeling
Mandatory broad-spectrum sunscreen use during daylight hours due to acid exfoliation
contraindications: Do not use on severely broken, raw, or actively infected skin barriers

name: Agelite-X Vitamin C Serum
description: An antioxidant facial serum formulated with a stable derivative of Vitamin C and Ferulic Acid.
claims: Provides topical antioxidant protection
May support a brighter skin appearance
May assist in improving visible skin texture
risk_factors: Contains added perfume which may trigger sensitivity in reactive skin profiles

name: Cliface Bio Oil Free Moisturizer Gel
description: A fragrance-free, oil-free gel moisturizer designed to deliver hydration to oily and breakout-prone configurations.
claims: Delivers lightweight hydration without adding excess surface oil
Helps manage surface shine with Zinc PCA
risk_factors: May provide insufficient hydration layers for extremely dry skin types

name: Cetaphil Restoraderm Skin Restoring Body Moisturizer
description: A deeply hydrating body lotion engineered for compromised, dry, and intensely uncomfortable skin profiles.
claims: Provides prolonged hydration to dry outer skin layers
Assists in conditioning a fragile skin moisture barrier
Helps alleviate discomfort associated with severe skin dryness
risk_factors: For external body use; avoid contact with mucous membranes

name: Clinikally Hyaluronic SkinBooster Serum
description: A hydration-focused topical serum designed to lock moisture into the epidermis.
claims: Provides immediate surface hydration layer boost
May temporarily plump the visual appearance of skin lines
risk_factors: May feel sticky or insufficient alone in very dry climates

name: DermaVow Vitamin C 20% Stabilized Serum
description: A high-potency 20% stabilized Vitamin C serum targeting localized discoloration and skin dullness.
claims: May assist in fading visible dark spots
Helps brighten uneven hyperpigmentation marks
Delivers concentrated antioxidant defense
risk_factors: High strength formulation; can cause transient stinging, redness, or mild warmth upon application
contraindications: Do not use on actively broken, raw, or highly compromised skin barriers

name: Clinikally HydraSoothe Moisturiser
description: A soothing, lightweight moisturizer built to calm skin irritation and maintain epidermal barrier comfort.
claims: Helps soothe temporary skin redness
Provides comforting hydration to irritated skin profiles
Supports barrier resilience
risk_factors: Avoid immediate area around the eyes

name: Clinikally Pigment Corrector Cream
description: A localized cosmetic skin cream targeting dark spots and regional complexion irregularities.
claims: May reduce the visibility of stubborn dark spots
Assists in promoting a more even overall complexion tone
risk_factors: Can cause mild sensitization to sunlight; mandatory daily broad-spectrum sunscreen use required

name: Clinikally SunProtect Sunscreen SPF 50/PA+++ (Twin Pack)
description: A high-value twin bundle pack of the broad-spectrum non-comedogenic sunscreen.
claims: Provides broad-spectrum UV protection
May assist in preventing sun-induced aging changes
risk_factors: Contains Benzophenone-3
Requires regular reapplication every 2 hours under physical outdoor stress

name: Clinikally HydraSoft Gentle Skin Cleanser (Twin Pack)
description: A high-volume bundled twin pack of the gentle, non-stripping daily lotion cleanser.
claims: May help cleanse without drying
May support skin barrier moisture levels during cleansing
risk_factors: For external topical administration only
